# GHL n8n Integration

Automate GoHighLevel using custom n8n bridge nodes.

## Skills & Documentation
- [GHL n8n Bridge Skill](file:///Users/somrat/Development/GoHighLevel/ghl-n8n/ghl-n8n-app/src/app/dashboard/SKILL.md): Comprehensive guide for AI agents to build n8n workflows with GHL Bridge nodes.

## Repository Structure
- `n8n-nodes-ghl-bridge/`: Source code for the n8n nodes.
- `ghl-n8n-app/`: The dashboard application.
